hero.title: Everything you need to ace your <highlight>Bac</highlight> and <highlight>Prépa</highlight>
hero.subtitle: Courses, summaries, corrected exercises, past national and regional exams, and timed mock exams — for 1st and 2nd year Baccalaureate and preparatory classes in Morocco.

levels.title: Pick your level
levels.subtitle: Content 100% aligned with the official Moroccan curriculum, organized by stream and subject.

features.title: Much more than a PDF library
features.subtitle: Qimma turns passive revision into active learning.

library.title: Complete library
library.desc: Courses, summaries, exercises and past national and regional exams with corrections, filterable by stream, subject, year and session.

mock.title: Timed mock exams
mock.desc: Train under real exam conditions: official duration, detailed grading scale and self-assessment.

hints.title: Progressive hints
hints.desc: Stuck on an exercise? Unlock hints level by level before seeing the correction — learn to search, not to copy.

tutor.title: Socratic AI tutor
tutor.desc: A smart tutor that guides you with questions without ever giving away the answer, available 24/7.

progress.title: Progress tracking
progress.desc: See your strengths and gaps per chapter, with an autonomy score and a personalized revision plan.

offline.title: Fast, even on 3G
offline.desc: An ultra-light site built for mobile, in French, Arabic and English. No intrusive ads.

one.title: Pick your stream
one.desc: 1BAC, 2BAC or CPGE — select your stream and subjects.

two.title: Revise actively
two.desc: Courses, exercises with progressive hints, quizzes and timed mock exams.

three.title: Track your progress
three.desc: Spot your gaps, earn XP and walk in confident on exam day.

cta.title: Ready to aim for honors?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students preparing the Bac and CNC with Qimma. Signing up is free.

catalog.coursesSubtitle: Pick your level, then your stream to access every subject.
catalog.examsSubtitle: National, regional and mock exams with detailed corrections.
catalog.subject: Subject
catalog.results: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# result} other {# results}}
catalog.comingSoon: Full content coming soon — the platform is under construction.

concours.title: Entrance exams & admissions
concours.subtitle: UM6P, ENSA, ENSAM, TAFEM, medicine, Lydex, CNC… prepare every entrance exam with past papers, mock exams and targeted quizzes.
concours.homeSubtitle: Selective universities, excellence high schools and grandes écoles: past papers and method for every admission.

footer.description: The Moroccan learning platform for the Baccalaureate and preparatory classes: courses, corrected exams, mock exams and an AI tutor.
